scripts.build: npm run build:react && npm run generate:pages && npm run hugo:build
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run hugo:serve" "npm run dev:react" "npm run dev:static:watch"
scripts.watch: concurrently "npm run hugo:serve" "npm --prefix ./pnp-samples-gallery run watch" "npm --prefix ./pnp-samples-gallery run watch:copy"
